project.name: commerce-faq-tasks
project.description: Multi-tenant Commerce FAQ SaaS backend with Express 5 API, 4-layer security stack, RAG pipeline (Elasticsearch BM25 + pgvector + Cross-encoder reranker + Groq 20B/120B LLMs), dialog state machine (clarify→answer→confirm→terminal), SalesFlow pipeline, and Prometheus/Grafana/Slack monitoring.

nodes.name: slack_listener.py
nodes.summary: HTTP server that listens for Slack interactive actions (button clicks) and forwards approval events to the local Claude Code permission hook. Handles POST for action payloads and GET for health checks.

nodes.name: slack_permission.py
nodes.summary: Claude Code permission hook that intercepts tool calls requiring approval, sends an interactive Slack message with Approve/Deny buttons, and blocks execution until the user responds. Validates URLs, file paths, and approval IDs to prevent SSRF/path-traversal attacks.

nodes.name: start_listener.sh
nodes.summary: Bash helper to start, stop, and check status of the slack_listener.py HTTP server as a background process, writing its PID to a lockfile.

nodes.name: add-default-avatars.ts
nodes.summary: One-off migration script that inserts default avatar configurations for all tenants that do not yet have an avatar record in Supabase.

nodes.name: analyzeSalesKpiFunnel.ts
nodes.summary: CLI tool that loads JSON sales-log files and computes per-stage funnel KPIs (conversion rates, drop-off points, template-source breakdown) then prints a markdown report.

nodes.name: analyzeTemplateFallbacks.ts
nodes.summary: CLI that cross-references a sales template matrix CSV with sales-log JSON to detect which cells fall back to generic templates and computes per-cell coverage statistics.

nodes.name: autoFillIntentSlugs.ts
nodes.summary: Script that reads Notion sales-template pages lacking an intentSlug, auto-generates slugs from phase/name, and writes them back to Notion via the sync service.

nodes.name: bench-agent-dialog.ts
nodes.summary: Load/latency benchmark that fires multiple concurrent HTTP requests at the dialog agent endpoint and reports p50/p95/p99 latencies.

nodes.name: bench-agent-search.ts
nodes.summary: Latency benchmark for the RAG search agent endpoint, computing percentile statistics across concurrent requests.

nodes.name: build-admin-ui.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds the Vite admin UI, verifying environment variables and outputting the production bundle to admin-ui/dist.

nodes.name: build-widget.sh
nodes.summary: Builds and verifies the embeddable widget bundle (public/widget.js) using esbuild, running size checks and content validation.

nodes.name: ci_perf_fast.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal CI performance smoke script that runs a quick latency check against the local API server.

nodes.name: convertSalesLogsCsvToJson.ts
nodes.summary: CLI converter that parses a sales-log CSV file (with persona-tag multi-values) and outputs a normalized JSON array for downstream analysis scripts.

nodes.name: convertTemplateMatrixCsvToJson.ts
nodes.summary: CLI converter that parses a template-matrix CSV (phase/intent/persona columns) into structured JSON MatrixCell objects for the template-fallback analyzer.

nodes.name: cors-config-template.ts
nodes.summary: Reusable CORS configuration helpers: origin allowlist matching with wildcard support, and Cache-Control header generation per path pattern.

nodes.name: create_all_md_context_zip.ts
nodes.summary: Utility that collects all Markdown files in the project and creates a timestamped zip archive for sharing context with LLMs.

nodes.name: create_phase17_context_zip.ts
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-17-specific context zip containing relevant source files and docs for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: create_phase18_context_zip.ts
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-18-specific context zip archive for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: deploy-slack-listener.sh
nodes.summary: Deploys and restarts the Slack permission-hook listener on the VPS via SSH, uploading the Python scripts and starting the daemon.

nodes.name: deploy-vps.sh
nodes.summary: Primary deployment script that rsyncs source to the Hetzner VPS, builds API and admin UI, verifies bundles, and restarts PM2 processes.

nodes.name: doctor.sh
nodes.summary: Quick health-check script that verifies required environment variables and connectivity to Elasticsearch and PostgreSQL.

nodes.name: encrypt-existing-embeddings.ts
nodes.summary: One-off migration script that reads plaintext embeddings from the database and re-saves them with AES encryption using the textEncrypt utility.

nodes.name: env_setup.sh
nodes.summary: Bootstrap script that creates required project directories and a skeleton .env file.

nodes.name: generateTemplateMatrix.ts
nodes.summary: Fetches all sales templates from Notion, builds a phase×intent×persona coverage matrix, computes gaps, and outputs a Markdown report.

nodes.name: gh_workflow_shortcuts.sh
nodes.summary: Shell aliases and helper functions for common GitHub Actions workflow operations (trigger, view logs, cancel runs).

nodes.name: loadTestDialogGraph.js
nodes.summary: JavaScript load-test harness that fires concurrent multi-turn dialog scenarios at the agent dialog endpoint and reports latency percentiles and assertion results.

nodes.name: make-phase11-context-zip.sh
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-11-specific context zip archive of source files for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: make-phase12-context-zip.sh
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-12-specific context zip archive including agent crew files for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: make-phase14-context.sh
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-14-specific context bundle for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: make-phase21-context-zip.sh
nodes.summary: Creates a phase-21-specific context zip archive with git-tracked file copying helpers for LLM context sharing.

nodes.name: make-phase22-context-zip.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that collects Phase 22 source files and packages them into a context zip archive for sharing or archival. Includes a cleanup trap function.

nodes.name: make_phase13_context_zip.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that assembles Phase 13 source files into a context zip archive. No named functions; uses linear script flow.

nodes.name: make_phase15_bundle.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script to bundle Phase 15 context files into a zip for distribution.

nodes.name: make_phase16_context_zip.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script with help function to package Phase 16 source files into a context zip, supporting optional flags for selective inclusion.

nodes.name: make_phase2_base.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash script creating the base project structure scaffolding for Phase 2.

nodes.name: migrate-base64-to-supabase.ts
nodes.summary: One-off TypeScript migration script that reads base64-encoded avatar images from PostgreSQL and re-uploads them to Supabase Storage, updating DB references.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates reading base64 avatar rows from PG and uploading each to Supabase Storage.

nodes.name: new_task_template.sh
nodes.summary: Tiny bash template script for scaffolding a new task file with standard boilerplate.

nodes.name: ocr-pdf-qwen.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript script that converts PDF pages to images, sends them to Qwen Vision API for OCR, chunks the resulting text, generates embeddings, and stores chunks in PostgreSQL.

nodes.name: callQwenWithRetry
nodes.summary: Calls the Qwen Vision API for OCR with retry logic on failure.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point orchestrating the full PDF-to-embedded-chunks pipeline.

nodes.name: parallel-dev.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that starts multiple development services in parallel (API server, admin UI, widget build) using background processes with a cleanup trap.

nodes.name: perf_agent.sh
nodes.summary: Short bash script that benchmarks the agent endpoint using curl or similar HTTP tooling.

nodes.name: perf_agent_budget.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that runs budget-constrained performance tests against the agent endpoint.

nodes.name: perf_local.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash script that runs performance tests against a local server instance.

nodes.name: perf_summary.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that aggregates and prints a summary of performance benchmark results.

nodes.name: report-stripe-usage.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript CLI script that queries PostgreSQL for tenant usage data and reports it to Stripe's metered billing API.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Queries DB for usage records and calls reportUsageToStripe for each tenant.

nodes.name: reset_pg.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash script that drops and recreates the PostgreSQL development database.

nodes.name: run-benchmark.test.ts
nodes.summary: Jest test suite that validates benchmark runner utilities (feature flags parsing, CSV formatting) with unit tests and mock dialog turn calls.

nodes.name: run-benchmark.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive TypeScript benchmark runner that simulates multi-turn dialog conversations against the live API, records results, formats CSV output, and writes a markdown summary.

nodes.name: simulateConversation
nodes.summary: Drives a full multi-turn dialog simulation against the agent API, collecting stage transitions and scores.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point: loads test conversations, applies feature flags, runs simulations, and writes markdown/CSV results.

nodes.name: TestConversation
nodes.summary: Interface describing a test conversation scenario with user turns and expected outcomes.

nodes.name: ConversationResult
nodes.summary: Interface capturing the result of a simulated conversation including stages, scores, and outcomes.

nodes.name: run-phase.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that runs a named project phase (build, test, or deploy step) by delegating to the appropriate sub-command.

nodes.name: run_sales_reports.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that generates sales analytics reports by running TypeScript report scripts with configurable date ranges and output formats.

nodes.name: run_template_fallback_report.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that runs the template fallback analysis report, identifying how often dialog falls back to default templates.

nodes.name: scrape-carnation.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript web scraper for the Carnation product site that fetches HTML, strips it to plain text, chunks content, generates embeddings, and stores results in PostgreSQL for RAG indexing.

nodes.name: fetchHtmlWithRetry
nodes.summary: Fetches HTML from a URL with exponential-backoff retry on failure.

nodes.name: security-headers.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript script and utility that defines current and recommended HTTP security headers, diffs them, and prints an audit report for compliance review.

nodes.name: diffHeaders
nodes.summary: Compares current vs recommended header maps and returns missing, extra, and value-mismatched headers.

nodes.name: security-scan.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that runs pnpm audit and checks for High/Critical CVEs, exiting non-zero to block deployment if vulnerabilities are found.

nodes.name: seedFaqEmbeddings.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript script that seeds FAQ question-answer pairs into PostgreSQL with OpenAI embeddings for vector search.

nodes.name: seed_es.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash script that seeds the Elasticsearch index with initial FAQ documents.

nodes.name: seed_pg.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash script that seeds the PostgreSQL database with initial schema and data.

nodes.name: setup-stripe-test.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript script that configures Stripe test-mode products, prices, and customer subscriptions for integration testing of the billing system.

nodes.name: setup_project_structure.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive bash setup script that creates the full project directory structure, placeholder files, and initial sales intent rules, with dry-run support.

nodes.name: smoke.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal bash smoke test script that verifies the deployed API health endpoint responds correctly.

nodes.name: sync-es.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript script that synchronizes FAQ data from PostgreSQL to Elasticsearch per tenant, managing index creation, deletion, and bulk indexing with vector embeddings.

nodes.name: syncTenant
nodes.summary: Fetches all FAQ rows for a given tenant from PG and bulk-indexes them into Elasticsearch.

nodes.name: bulkIndex
nodes.summary: Performs Elasticsearch bulk indexing with vector embeddings for a list of FAQ rows.

nodes.name: sync-notion.ts
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that instantiates NotionSyncService and triggers a full Notion sync for the project.

nodes.name: testDialogGraph.js
nodes.summary: Manual smoke-test script that runs the LangGraph dialog orchestrator against a hardcoded query to verify graph wiring.

nodes.name: testDialogScenarios.js
nodes.summary: Integration scenario runner that exercises 8 dialog scenarios (shipping, returns, payment, stock, safety, long-history) against a live HTTP agent endpoint.

nodes.name: assertCond
nodes.summary: Lightweight assertion helper that throws on failure.

nodes.name: callAgent
nodes.summary: HTTP helper that POSTs to the agent dialog endpoint and returns parsed JSON.

nodes.name: tz-middleware-template.ts
nodes.summary: Template module providing Express timezone middleware (createTimezoneMiddleware), IANA timezone validation, and date formatting helpers for multi-locale deployments.

nodes.name: createTimezoneMiddleware
nodes.summary: Factory returning an Express middleware that resolves and attaches the request timezone from header, query, or default.

nodes.name: formatDateInTimezone
nodes.summary: Formats a Date object into locale string using the specified IANA timezone.

nodes.name: validateTuningTemplates.ts
nodes.summary: CLI validator that fetches all Notion tuning templates and checks required fields (phase, personaTag, prompt length, variables), reporting errors and counts.

nodes.name: validateTemplate
nodes.summary: Core validation function that checks a single NotionTuningTemplate against all business rules, returning a list of error strings.

nodes.name: wait_es.sh
nodes.summary: Tiny shell script that polls Elasticsearch health endpoint until it is ready (used in CI/dev startup).

nodes.name: wait_pg.sh
nodes.summary: Tiny shell script that polls PostgreSQL until it accepts connections (used in CI/dev startup).

nodes.name: weekly-report.ts
nodes.summary: CLI runner that creates a pg Pool and calls runWeeklyReport to generate and dispatch the weekly analytics report.

nodes.name: zip-phase19-context.sh
nodes.summary: Build script that collects Phase 19 source files into a zip archive for context sharing or review.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat-config for the admin-ui React/TypeScript app, configuring typescript-eslint, react-hooks, and react-refresh rules.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component defining the admin SPA routing tree: wraps all pages in AuthProvider and LangProvider, guards routes with RequireAuth/SuperAdminRoute, and maps URL paths to admin page components.

nodes.name: AppInner
nodes.summary: Main routing component that renders the full admin SPA route hierarchy including knowledge, tenants, monitoring, billing, avatar, and feedback pages.

nodes.name: useAuth.tsx
nodes.summary: React auth context providing Supabase session management, user role parsing (super_admin/admin/viewer), and login/logout for the admin UI.

nodes.name: AuthProvider
nodes.summary: React context provider that tracks Supabase auth state changes and exposes user, role, login, logout.

nodes.name: AdminAIChat.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin AI chat panel component that streams multi-turn conversation with the backend AI assist API, displaying message history and handling loading states.

nodes.name: ApiKeyCreateModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal component for creating new tenant API keys, calling the admin API key issuance endpoint with Supabase auth token.

nodes.name: BackLink.tsx
nodes.summary: Simple reusable back-navigation link component using react-router-dom.

nodes.name: KnowledgeFaqEditModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Large modal component for editing FAQ knowledge items: handles create/update/delete of FAQ entries with multilingual support and Supabase auth.

nodes.name: LangSwitcher.tsx
nodes.summary: UI component for toggling language (ja/en) using the LangContext.

nodes.name: RoleGuard.tsx
nodes.summary: Route guard components (RequireAuth, SuperAdminRoute, SuperAdminOnly) that redirect unauthenticated users or non-super-admins away from protected routes.

nodes.name: UsageChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Chart component visualizing daily usage data (API call volume) for the billing/usage dashboard.

nodes.name: ABTestTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin tab component for managing A/B test variants: create, enable/disable, and view variant configurations inline.

nodes.name: AIReportTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive AI analytics tab showing weekly KPI cards, score trend charts, psychology principle breakdown, objection patterns, and outcome scores — all fetched from the reports API.

nodes.name: ScoreTrendChart
nodes.summary: Sub-component rendering a time-series chart of conversation evaluation scores.

nodes.name: KpiCards
nodes.summary: Sub-component displaying KPI metric cards (sessions, resolutions, CSAT).

nodes.name: FileUpload.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin file upload component supporting PDF and text file uploads for knowledge ingestion, with client-side validation and progress feedback.

nodes.name: KpiCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable KPI metric card component displaying a label, value, delta, and trend indicator.

nodes.name: ObjectionPatternsTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin tab listing detected objection patterns from conversations, with pattern text, frequency, and suggested responses.

nodes.name: TenantSlaTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Table component showing per-tenant SLA metrics (response time, uptime, error rate) with colour-coded status badges.

nodes.name: FeedbackChat.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat replay UI that renders a historical conversation thread for reviewing and rating user feedback sessions.

nodes.name: BulkActionBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Floating action bar shown when multiple knowledge items are selected, providing bulk delete and toggle-global operations.

nodes.name: FaqSearchBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Search input component for filtering the FAQ knowledge list by keyword.

nodes.name: GlobalKnowledgeCheckbox.tsx
nodes.summary: Checkbox component toggling whether a knowledge item is marked as global (shared across all tenants).

nodes.name: KnowledgeListTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Main knowledge management tab: paginated, searchable FAQ list with inline edit modal, bulk selection, global-toggle, and vector re-index actions.

nodes.name: Pagination.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable pagination control component for the knowledge management list, displaying current page position, prev/next buttons, and a per-page size selector. Integrates with the i18n system via useLang.

nodes.name: Pagination
nodes.summary: Default-exported React component that renders prev/next page buttons and a per-page limit select, computing display range from total/offset/limit props.

nodes.name: PdfUploadSection.tsx
nodes.summary: PDF upload panel component that triggers OCR processing and polls job status at 10-second intervals until done or failed, then refreshes the book list. Supports super-admin global-target toggle.

nodes.name: PdfUploadSection
nodes.summary: Default-exported component managing PDF file upload, OCR job polling, and book-list refresh using setInterval and AbortController cleanup.

nodes.name: TextInputTab.tsx
nodes.summary: Two-step FAQ generation tab: converts free-form text to FAQ preview via AI (POST /knowledge/text), then commits selected entries. Supports per-FAQ category override and super-admin global target.

nodes.name: TextInputTab
nodes.summary: Default-exported component implementing text-to-FAQ convert+commit flow with inline preview editing and category selection.

nodes.name: UrlScrapeTab.tsx
nodes.summary: URL scraping tab accepting up to 5 URLs, calling POST /knowledge/scrape for AI FAQ extraction, showing per-URL preview with editable categories, then committing on confirm. Emits onCommitSuccess callback.

nodes.name: UrlScrapeTab
nodes.summary: Default-exported component for scraping URLs to FAQs with a two-step fetch-preview/commit flow and per-FAQ category override.

nodes.name: shared.ts
nodes.summary: Shared types, utility functions, and CSS-in-JS style constants for the knowledge management UI. Exports fetchWithAuth (with 401-triggered token refresh), getAccessToken, formatDate, and style objects.

nodes.name: fetchWithAuth
nodes.summary: Authenticated fetch wrapper that attaches Bearer token and retries once with a refreshed session on 401/403 responses.

nodes.name: getAccessToken
nodes.summary: Retrieves the current Supabase access token from the session, returning null if unauthenticated.

nodes.name: TuningRuleModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for creating or editing tuning rules with trigger pattern, expected behavior, scope (tenant vs global), priority slider 0-10, and active toggle. Includes source-conversation preview panel for rules created from chat history.

nodes.name: TuningRuleModal
nodes.summary: Default-exported modal component for CRUD operations on tuning rules, supporting create/edit modes with validation and a mocked async save (TODO: replace with API call).

nodes.name: ChatInput.tsx
nodes.summary: Accessible chat message input component with auto-resize textarea (max 120px), Enter-to-send (Shift+Enter for newline), and mobile-friendly 44px send button. Part of the embeddable widget UI.

nodes.name: ChatInput
nodes.summary: Default-exported textarea-based input component with auto-resize, keyboard shortcut handling, and disabled state during loading.

nodes.name: ChatWidget.tsx
nodes.summary: Embeddable chat widget root component: floating action button, slide-up panel with MessageList and ChatInput, bidirectional postMessage bridge with host page (open/close/toggle commands and outbound events), calls /api/chat with X-Tenant-ID header.

nodes.name: ChatWidget
nodes.summary: Default-exported root widget component managing open/close state, message history, API calls to /api/chat, AbortController for in-flight cancellation, and postMessage host bridge.

nodes.name: generateId
nodes.summary: Generates a unique message ID string using timestamp and random base-36 suffix.

nodes.name: MessageList.tsx
nodes.summary: Scrollable message list with role-aware chat bubbles, timestamp display, animated typing indicator (3 bouncing dots respecting prefers-reduced-motion), and auto-scroll to bottom on new messages.

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: Default-exported component rendering a scrollable list of user/assistant messages with loading indicator and auto-scroll ref.

nodes.name: LangContext.tsx
nodes.summary: React context provider for Japanese/English internationalization with localStorage persistence and a type-safe translate function supporting variable interpolation.

nodes.name: LangProvider
nodes.summary: Context provider that initializes language from localStorage, persists changes, and exposes a memoized t() translation function.

nodes.name: useLang
nodes.summary: Custom hook that returns the current language, setLang, and t() from LangContext.

nodes.name: en.ts
nodes.summary: English translation dictionary (453 keys) for the admin UI, covering knowledge management, tuning, billing, chat, avatar, tenant, and monitoring sections.

nodes.name: ja.ts
nodes.summary: Japanese translation dictionary (452 keys) serving as the canonical source of TranslationKey types for the admin UI i18n system.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: Central API utility for the admin UI: exports API_BASE (from VITE_API_BASE env), authFetch (auto-attaches Bearer token with Supabase session), and deprecated adminFetch wrapper.

nodes.name: authFetch
nodes.summary: Exported fetch wrapper that auto-attaches Authorization: Bearer header from Supabase session, throwing __AUTH_REQUIRED__ if no token.

nodes.name: supabaseClient.ts
nodes.summary: Initializes the Supabase JS client from VITE_SUPABASE_URL/VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env vars, with a supabaseConfigured boolean flag and safe dummy values fallback when unconfigured.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: React application entry point: mounts App component in StrictMode to the #root DOM element.

nodes.name: FaqForm.tsx
nodes.summary: Create/edit FAQ form page with two modes: fetches existing FAQ data in edit mode, submits to POST/PUT /admin/faqs with question, answer, category, and publish toggle.

nodes.name: FaqForm
nodes.summary: Default-exported page component for creating or editing a single FAQ entry, with auth-redirect on 401 and loading/saving state management.

nodes.name: FaqList.tsx
nodes.summary: FAQ list page with client-side filtering (search, published toggle, category), delete with confirmation, sorted by updated_at desc, and navigation to create/edit forms.

nodes.name: FaqList
nodes.summary: Default-exported list page component fetching all FAQs on mount, supporting search/category/published filters and delete operations.

nodes.name: Login.tsx
nodes.summary: Login page using Supabase email+password auth; redirects to /faqs if already authenticated, or to / on successful sign-in.

nodes.name: Login
nodes.summary: Default-exported login page with email/password form calling supabase.auth.signInWithPassword, handling existing session redirect.

nodes.name: avatar-defaults/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Super-admin page for managing 8 default avatar template images; handles per-template file upload to Supabase Storage, with upload state tracking and success/error feedback per slot.

nodes.name: AvatarDefaultsPage
nodes.summary: Default-exported page managing 8 named avatar template slots with per-slot image upload, preview, and feedback UI.

nodes.name: avatar/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Tenant avatar management page (718 lines) for configuring AI avatar appearance, voice, and integration settings; fetches tenant avatar config and provides form-based update workflow.

nodes.name: avatar/studio.tsx
nodes.summary: Avatar studio page (889 lines) for advanced avatar customization including live preview, pose/expression selection, and image generation or upload; most complex avatar UI component.

nodes.name: billing/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Billing dashboard page (851 lines) showing usage metrics, subscription plan details, cost breakdown, and Stripe integration status for the current tenant.

nodes.name: chat-history/[sessionId].tsx
nodes.summary: Session detail page (513 lines) showing full chat history for a specific session ID, with message timeline and metadata display; supports creating tuning rules from individual messages.

nodes.name: chat-history/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat history list page showing paginated session records with filtering by date range and tenant, linking to individual session detail views.

nodes.name: chat-test/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive chat testing page (685 lines) allowing admins to send test messages through the RAG pipeline and inspect raw API responses, model routing decisions, and retrieved context.

nodes.name: feedback/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Feedback management page (707 lines) listing user feedback entries with sentiment filtering, AI-generated analysis summaries, and export functionality.

nodes.name: admin/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Main admin dashboard page (668 lines) with KPI cards, AB test results tab, AI report tab, and objection patterns tab; acts as the primary analytics hub.

nodes.name: knowledge-gaps/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Knowledge gap discovery page (402 lines) surfacing unanswered or low-confidence queries to help admins identify missing FAQ coverage.

nodes.name: knowledge/[tenantId].tsx
nodes.summary: Per-tenant knowledge management page (1596 lines); the largest admin-UI file, integrating FAQ list, text-input, URL-scrape, and PDF upload tabs with bulk-action support, search/filter, and paginated results.

nodes.name: knowledge/books.tsx
nodes.summary: Partner-facing book (PDF knowledge base) management page (753 lines) with upload, status tracking (uploaded→processing→chunked→embedded), deletion, and a polling refresh mechanism.

nodes.name: knowledge/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin knowledge page — super_admin sees all tenant list; client_admin auto-redirects to their own tenant knowledge page. Fetches tenants from /v1/admin/tenants.

nodes.name: KnowledgePage
nodes.summary: Default export React component. Redirects client_admin to their tenant page; renders tenant list for super_admin.

nodes.name: monitoring/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Admin monitoring dashboard — displays KPI cards, tenant SLA rows, and polling-based metrics refresh. Uses Prometheus/API data via authFetch.

nodes.name: MonitoringPage
nodes.summary: Default export React component rendering KPI summary cards and per-tenant SLA table.

nodes.name: buildTenantRows
nodes.summary: Builds tenant SLA row JSX spanning the bulk of the component — 250-line inner render helper.

nodes.name: tenants/[id].tsx
nodes.summary: Tenant detail page — tabs for chat-widget settings, CORS config, API key management, A/B tests, objection patterns, AI reports, and embed code. 1468 lines, high complexity.

nodes.name: TenantDetailPage
nodes.summary: Default export React component — main tenant detail view with tab switching, toast notifications, and data loading.

nodes.name: fetchTenantDetail
nodes.summary: Fetches full tenant detail including metadata, widget config, and CORS origins from the admin API.

nodes.name: ApiKeysTab
nodes.summary: Inline component for managing API keys — list, revoke, and issue new keys with modal support.

nodes.name: tenants/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Tenants listing page for super_admin — CRUD list with create-tenant modal, pagination, and navigation to tenant detail.

nodes.name: TenantsPage
nodes.summary: Default export React component — renders tenant list, create modal trigger, and handles post-create refresh.

nodes.name: CreateTenantModal
nodes.summary: Modal component for creating a new tenant with form fields and API call to POST /v1/admin/tenants.

nodes.name: tuning/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Tuning rules CRUD page — list/create/update/delete/toggle tuning rules with tenant scope badge and modal editor.

nodes.name: TuningRulesPage
nodes.summary: Default export React component — full tuning rules management UI with search, active toggle, and bulk delete.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite config for admin-ui React SPA — defines API proxy /v1 to localhost:3100 and React plugin.

nodes.name: agent.py
nodes.summary: LiveKit avatar agent — FishAudio TTS integration with Groq LLM, tenant-aware config fetch, room-based tenant ID extraction, and data-channel chat handling.

nodes.name: FishAudioTTS
nodes.summary: LiveKit TTS plugin adapter wrapping FishAudio API for avatar voice synthesis.

nodes.name: FishAudioChunkedStream
nodes.summary: Chunked TTS stream with tenant extraction from LiveKit room name and data-channel chat handler using Groq LLM.

nodes.name: contextStore.ts
nodes.summary: In-memory dialog session history store — get/overwrite/append operations for phase7-minimal variant.

nodes.name: dialogAgent.ts
nodes.summary: Dialog turn entry point — manages session ID generation, history retrieval, orchestrator routing, and multi-step plan execution for phase7-minimal.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Type definitions for dialog flow — PlanStep union (clarify/search/followup/answer), DialogMessage, DialogTurnInput/Result, multi-step query plan.

nodes.name: dialogOrchestrator.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for dialogOrchestrator — clarify branch, search branch, followup query preference.

nodes.name: dialogOrchestrator.ts
nodes.summary: Dialog orchestrator — routes clarify vs. search steps, invokes runSearchAgent, returns OrchestratorResult with answer and steps.

nodes.name: llmMultiStepPlannerRuntime.ts
nodes.summary: LLM-backed multi-step planner runtime — builds planner prompts, calls Groq/OpenAI model router, parses multi-step query plan JSON.

nodes.name: buildPlannerPrompts

nodes.name: langDetect.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for language detection middleware validating Accept-Language header parsing and language routing.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: Express HTTP route handlers, request/response DTOs, and the application entry point (src/index.ts). Handles all inbound HTTP traffic, validates inputs, and delegates to service or data layers.

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Core business logic including the dialog orchestrator (LangGraph/Phase22 state machine), sales flow pipeline, RAG search (Elasticsearch + pgvector + cross-encoder reranker), LLM integration (Groq 20B/120B), external integrations (Notion, Slack, Stripe), and the Python LiveKit avatar agent.

layers.name: Middleware Layer
layers.description: Cross-cutting HTTP middleware: authentication (API key + JWT), rate limiting, CORS preflight handling, security headers, and tenant context loading. Applied in a strict 4-tier stack before route handlers.

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: Database access abstractions including the centralized DB connection pool (src/lib/db.ts), repository classes, pgvector/Convex adapters, TypeScript type contracts, and backend UI helper utilities. Owns all persistence concerns.

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: All frontend code: the React admin SPA (admin-ui/), the 1-line embeddable widget (public/widget.js), and archived frontend prototypes (front/). Communicates with the backend exclusively through the documented API endpoints.

layers.name: Config Layer
layers.description: Environment variable validation (src/config/env.ts with Zod), application-level constants, Claude Code hooks (.claude/hooks/), and inline SCRIPTS referenced from src/. Provides the configuration contract consumed by all other layers.

layers.name: Utility / Archive Layer
layers.description: Operational scripts (SCRIPTS/), automated test suites (tests/), and historical/archived codebase snapshots (phase12-context/, phase12-context 2/, commerce-faq-phase7-minimal/, root-level n* nodes). Not part of the production runtime dependency graph.

tour.title: Server Entry Point & Bootstrap
tour.description: src/index.ts is the Express 5 server that wires together the entire application. It has the highest fan-out in the codebase (37 outbound edges), mounting every API route and applying the 4-layer security stack in order: rateLimiter → auth → tenantContext → securityPolicy. Understanding this file gives you a mental map of all modules that follow.

tour.title: Environment Configuration & Validation
tour.description: src/config/env.ts centralises every environment variable and validates them with Zod at startup. Any missing or malformed variable causes an early, informative crash rather than a silent runtime failure. This is the single source of truth for DATABASE_URL, ES_URL, Groq API keys, Slack webhook, and feature flags.

tour.title: Core Domain Types & Contracts
tour.description: src/agent/dialog/types.ts is the most-imported file in the entire graph (fan-in 13), defining the shared dialog state machine types used across orchestrators, planners, and routes. src/types/contracts.ts complements this with tenant, RAG, and billing domain contracts. Reading both files before exploring any feature code prevents confusion about type names.

tour.title: 4-Layer Security Stack
tour.description: src/agent/http/authMiddleware.ts (fan-in 6) is the authentication gateway that handles both x-api-key and JWT auth modes, extracting tenantId securely from the token rather than the request body. src/admin/http/supabaseAuthMiddleware.ts (fan-in 5) mirrors this for admin routes using Supabase JWTs. src/auth/verifySupabaseJwt.ts contains the underlying JWT verification logic shared by both.

tour.title: Chat API Route
tour.description: src/api/chat/route.ts is the primary public-facing endpoint (POST /api/chat) that widget clients call. It validates the incoming request, delegates to the dialog agent, and enforces the RAG excerpt 200-char safety limit before responding. This route sits behind all four security middleware layers applied by the entry point.

tour.title: Embeddable Widget
tour.description: public/widget.js is the 1-line customer-facing embed script and has the highest raw fan-out in the codebase (41 edges) because it bundles all widget UI logic. It initialises a Shadow DOM to isolate styles, reads the data-api-key attribute, and communicates with POST /api/chat. Reviewing it explains how third-party partners integrate RAJIUCE into their storefronts.

tour.title: Dialog Agent & Query Planner
tour.description: src/agent/dialog/dialogAgent.ts (fan-out 14) is the central coordinator for FAQ conversations. It calls src/agent/flow/queryPlanner.ts (fan-out 12) to decide whether to use a rule-based or LLM multi-step plan before invoking search and generation. The planner's tags—rule-based and llm—show it supports two execution paths based on query complexity.

tour.title: Dialog State Machine & Context
tour.description: src/agent/flow/dialogOrchestrator.ts drives the clarify→answer→confirm→terminal state machine defined in Phase 22. It reads conversation history from src/agent/dialog/contextStore.ts, which maintains per-session in-memory state. Together these two files implement the turn-by-turn flow that prevents the bot from skipping to an answer before the user's intent is fully understood.

tour.title: RAG Pipeline: Search & Rerank
tour.description: src/search/rerank.ts (tags: rerank, cross-encoder, onnx, rag) is the final stage of the retrieval pipeline, scoring candidate passages from ES BM25 + pgvector using an ONNX cross-encoder model loaded locally. Results are filtered to ≤200-char excerpts before being returned to the dialog agent, keeping book content safely bounded.

tour.title: Sales Flow: Orchestrator & Intent Detection
tour.description: src/agent/orchestrator/sales/salesOrchestrator.ts (fan-out 14) implements the SalesFlow pipeline: clarify→propose→recommend→close. It calls src/agent/orchestrator/sales/salesIntentDetector.ts to classify whether a user message is sales-intent, and then selects the appropriate stage prompt builder. This pipeline runs in parallel with the FAQ dialog flow when commerce intent is detected.

tour.title: Sales Rules & Prompt Builders
tour.description: src/agent/orchestrator/sales/salesRules.ts is the second-most imported file in the codebase (fan-in 12), acting as a plugin-pattern provider for per-tenant sales rules and templates. src/agent/orchestrator/sales/proposePromptBuilder.ts (fan-in 5) is the most-referenced of the stage prompt builders, constructing the LLM prompt for the propose phase from rules and detected intent.

tour.title: Monitoring: Metrics & Tenant Context
tour.description: src/lib/metrics/metricsCollector.ts (fan-out 16) instruments every major code path for Prometheus collection, emitting counters for chat turns, RAG latency, and LLM model usage (with the 120B/20B ratio tracked to enforce the ≤10% cost constraint). src/lib/tenant-context.ts (fan-out 12) propagates tenantId through the request lifecycle so all metrics and logs are scoped per tenant.

tour.title: Admin UI Entry Point
tour.description: admin-ui/src/App.tsx is the React SPA served on port 5173 that gives partners visibility into knowledge gaps, chat history, tuning rules, evaluations, and variant experiments. It is protected by src/admin/http/supabaseAuthMiddleware.ts and communicates with the admin API routes mounted in src/index.ts. The VITE_API_BASE env var controls which API host it targets.
